channel.title: Yang on Daoyin Chuan
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

item.title: Taijiquan Berkeley Set
item.description:
• Preparation (Standing Wu Chi, Compose oneself, Head up, Arms at sides, Feet together, Relax)
  • Beginning
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Snake Creeps Down
  • Step Up To Seven Stars
  • Retreat to Ride the Tiger
  • Turn Body Sweep Lotus Leg
  • Bend Bow and Shoot Tiger
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Apparent Close-up
  • Cross Hands
  • Conclusion

item.title: Taijiquan Broadsword (Dao)
item.description:
1. Left Ward Off
  2. Step-up to Form Seven Stars
  3. Step Back to Riding Tiger Posture
  4. Turn Body, Lift Right Leg and Cut
  5. Slash Upward to the Left
  6. Thrust the Blade
  7. Circle Blade Back, Step and Press Vertically (3 times)
  8. Draw the Bow Horizontally
  9. Push the Blade
  10. Fleeing to Pierce
  11. Corner Cut #1
  12. Corner Cut #2
  13. Corner Cut #3
  14. Corner Cut #4
  15. Lift Blade to Pierce
  16. Coil Back Stance
  17. Step Forward and Thrust the Blade
  18. Turn and Slash
  19. Recover Sword to the Left Hand and Toe Kick
  20. Left Strike the Tiger
  21. Right Strike the Tiger
  22. Heel Kick
  23. Split Down
  24. Lift Blade to Pierce
  25. Coil Back Stance
  26. Step Through and Thrust the Blade
  27. Slash Up Right
  28. Slash Up Left
  29. Slash Up Right
  30. Jump and Coil Back Stance
  31. Step Forward and Thrust the Blade
  32. Turn and Slash
  33. Return Sword to Left Hand
  34. Step Up to Form Seven Stars
  35. Conclusion

item.title: Taijiquan Da-Lu
item.description:
Part A Part B
1. Wardoff
2. Step Forward
3. Shoulder
4. Rollback
5. Pulldown
6. Wardoff
7. Yield
8. Step Forward
9. etc…		 1. Rollback
2. Pulldown
3. Wardoff
4. Yield
5. Step Forward
6. Shoulder
7. Rollback
8. Pulldown
9. etc…

item.title: Taijiquan San-Shou
item.description:
Part A Part B
1. Step Forward & Punch
2. Step Forward, Parry & Punch
3. Step Forward & Left Shoulder
4. Left Elbow Stroke
5. Chop Opponent (Left)
6. Turn and Hit Tiger Left
7. Lift Hand & Step Forward
8. Chop Opponent (Right)
9. Split
10. Hit Tiger Right (Right & Low)
11. Step Forward & Left Shoulder
12. Separate Hands & Kick (Right)
13. Step Forward & Bend Backward
14. Left Wardoff & Chop Opponent (Right)
15. Left Shoulder
16. Turn & Push
17. Double Push
18. Single Push
19. Push
20. Neutralize the Push
21. Pull and Bend Backward
22. Hit Tiger (Right)
23. Step Forward & Left Shoulder
24. Right Shoulder
25. Right Elbow Stroke
26. Step Back & Neutralize
27. Turn and Left Shoulder
28. Toe Kick (Right)
29. Toe Kick (Left)
30. Right Shoulder
31. Step Forward & Left Wardoff
32. Right Wardoff
33. Right Wardoff
34. Step Forward & High Pat the Horse
35. Turn Body & Lotus Kick
36. Snake Creeps Down
37. Hit Tiger (Left)
38. Step Back to Repulse the Monkey
39. Step Back to Repulse the Monkey
40. Step Back to Repulse the Monkey
41. Needle at Sea Bottom
42. Play the Fiddle
43. Turn and Single Whip
44. Cross Hands
1. Raise Hand & Step Forward
2. Parry and Punch
3. Hit Tiger (Right)
4. Right Push
5. Right Shoulder
6. Chop Opponent (Right)
7. Turn and Push
8. Parry and Punch
9. Part the Wild Horse’s Mane (Left)
10. Turn and Rollback
11. Turn and Push
12. Punch (Low)
13. Fair Lady Works Shuttles (Right)
14. White Crane Spreads Wings
15. Withdraw & Pullback
16. Strike Ears with Fists
17. Step Back, Parry and Punch
18. Right Arm Break
19. Chop Opponent (Right)
20. Elbow Stroke (Right)
21. Change Feet & Pullback
22. Withdraw and Pullback
23. Press Forward
24. Turn & Left Shoulder
25. Golden Cock Stands on One Leg (Right)
26. Heel Kick
27. Pullback (Left)
28. Right Brush Knee
29. Left Brush Knee
30. Return Right Shoulder
31. Wave Hands Like Clouds (Right)
32. Wave Hands Like Clouds (Left)
33. Turn and Chop Opponent (Right)
34. White Crane Spreads Wings and Lotus Kick
35. Slanting Flying (Left)
36. Slanting Flying (Right)
37. Turn, Parry and Punch
38. Left Slapping
39. Right Slapping
40. Step Up to Seven Stars
41. Fan Through the Back
42. Bend Bow to Shoot Tiger
43. Fist Under Elbow
44. Embrace Tiger, Return to Mountain

item.title: Taijiquan Staff/Spear (Gan)
item.description:
3 Solo Postures

  • Opening/Neutralizing (K’ai)
  • Pressing/Seizing (Ho)
  • Issuing/Attacking (Fa)

2 Person Sticky Staff

Jabbing the Shoulder, Throat, Heart, and Leg

item.title: Taijiquan Sword (Jian)
item.description:
1. Beginning Posture
  2. Three Rings Circle the Moon
  3. Great Star of the Literary God
  4. Swallow Searches the Water
  5. Right Block and Sweep
  6. Left Block and Sweep
  7. Small Star of the Literary God
  8. Swallow Enters the Nest
  9. Agile Cat Catches the Rat
  10. Dragonfly Touches the Water
  11. Wasp Enters the Cave
  12. Phoenix Spreads Its Wings
  13. Left Cyclone
  14. Small Star of the Literary God
  15. Right Cyclone
  16. Waiting for Fish
  17. Parting the Grass Looking for Snakes
  18. Clasping the Moon to the Bosom
  19. Bird Goes to Roost in the Forest
  20. Black Dragon Wags Its Tail
  21. Wind Curls the Lotus Leaves
  22. Lion Shakes Its Head
  23. Tiger Hold Its Head
  24. Wild Horse Jumps the Mountain Stream
  25. Turn Body and Rein the Horse
  26. Step Up
  27. The Compass
  28. Shaking the Duster in the Wind
  29. Following the Current Pushing the Boat
  30. Shooting Star Catches Up with the Moon
  31. Heavenly Horse Travels the Void
  32. Roll Up the Screen
  33. Left and Right Cart Wheels Sword
  34. Great Peng Spreads Wing
  35. Fishing the Moon Out from the Bottom of the Sea
  36. Clasping the Moon to the Bosom
  37. Night Demons Explore the Sea
  38. Rhinoceros Gazes at the Moon
  39. Shooting the Wild Goose
  40. White Ape Presents Fruit
  41. Phoenix Spreads Its Wings
  42. Left and Right Straddle and Block
  43. Shooting the Wild Goose
  44. White Ape Presents Fruit
  45. Left and Right Flowers Fall
  46. Fair Lady Threads the Shuttle
  47. White Tiger Wags Its Tail
  48. Tiger Holds Its Tail
  49. Carp Jumps the Dragon Gate
  50. Black Dragon Twines Around the Pillar
  51. Immortal Points Out the Road
  52. Wind Sweeps the Plum Blossoms
  53. Tiger Holds Its Head
  54. The Compass
  55. Enfolding the Sword, Returning to the Beginning

item.title: Taijiquan Yang Style
item.description:
First Section

  • Preparation (Standing Wu Chi, Compose oneself, Head up, Arms at sides, Feet together, Relax)
  • Beginning
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Lift Hands, Shoulder Strike
  • White Crane Spreads it’s Wings
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Play the Lute
  • Brush Knee, Left and Twist Step
  • Brush Knee, Right and Twist Step
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Play the Lute
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Apparent Close-up
  • Cross Hands

Second Section

  • Carry Tiger to Mountain
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Fist Under Elbow
  • Repulse Monkey, Right
  • Repulse Monkey, Left
  • Repulse Monkey - Right
  • Diagonal Flying
  • Lift Hands, Shoulder Strike
  • White Crane Spreads it’s Wings
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Needle at Sea Bottom
  • Fan Through the Back
  • Turn, Chop with Fist
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Cloud Hands
  • Single Whip
  • High Pat Horse
  • Kick with Right Toe
  • Kick with Left Toe
  • Turn, Kick with Left Sole
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Brush Knee, Right and Step
  • Step Up and Punch Downward
  • Turn, Chop with Fist
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Kick with Right Sole
  • Strike Tiger, Left Side
  • Strike Tiger, Right Side
  • Kick with Right Sole
  • Strike Opponent’s Ears with Fists
  • Kick with Left Sole
  • Pivot Around, Kick with Right Sole
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Apparent Close-up
  • Cross Hands

Third Section

  • Carry Tiger to Mountain
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Wild Horse Parts Mane, Right
  • Wild Horse Parts Mane, Left
  • Wild Horse Parts Mane, Right
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Fair Lady Works the Shuttles, Left
  • Fair Lady Works the Shuttles, Right
  • Fair Lady Works the Shuttles, Left
  • Fair Lady Works the Shuttles, Right
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Cloud Hands
  • Single Whip
  • Snake Creeps Down
  • Golden Cock Stands on One Leg, Left
  • Golden Cock Stands on One Leg, Right
  • Repulse Monkey, Right
  • Step Back, Repulse Monkey, Left
  • Step Back, Repulse Monkey, Right
  • Diagonal Flying
  • Lift Hands, Shoulder Strike
  • White Crane Spreads it’s Wings
  • Brush Knee, Left and Step
  • Needle at Sea Bottom
  • Fan Through the Back
  • White Snake Puts Out Tongue
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Cloud Hands
  • Single Whip
  • High Pat Horse
  • Cross Hands
  • Turn and Cross Kick
  • Step up, Punch downward
  • Ward-Off, Left
  • Grasp the Sparrow’s Tail (Ward Off, Left; Ward Off, Right; Roll Back; Press; Push)
  • Single Whip
  • Snake Creeps Down
  • Step Up To Seven Stars
  • Retreat to Ride the Tiger
  • Turn Body Sweep Lotus Leg
  • Bend Bow and Shoot Tiger
  • Step Up, Block, Parry and Punch
  • Apparent Close-up
